title: Better With Breasts!
description: Gives your character breasts in BTA!
body:
**Only works on 8.X+!**
This is an asset pack for Better than Adventure! that gives your character breasts!
Download **BWB.zip** and put it in your **texturepacks** folder!

Additionally, you can install a language pack that changes things like "Zombie pigman" to "Zombie pigwoman"! Download **fem_US.zip** and put it in your **languages** folder!
